case_title: SANG HO LEE ET AL VS. JEFFREY YEUNG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-08-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS (2), ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,096.00 FILED BY LEE, SANG HO JOO, KOEUN AS TO DEFENDANT YEUNG, JEFFREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
